hero.headline: Beauty That Comes To You
hero.subheadline: Elite makeup artists and hair stylists — as seen in Vogue — delivered to your luxury hotel room or home. Available daily 6:30am to 9pm across New York City.
checkmarks: Artists from Chanel Runways & A-list clients

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: On-Demand Beauty Services
services.subtitle: From blowouts to bridal, our elite artists bring the salon experience directly to you.

cards.title: In-Room Hair Styling
cards.description: Professional blowouts, updos, and styling delivered to your luxury hotel room by expertly-trained stylists for any occasion.

cards.title: Makeup Artistry
cards.description: On-demand professional makeup by elite artists who have worked on Chanel Runways and with A-list celebrities like Jessica Alba.

cards.title: Bridal Hair & Makeup
cards.description: Comprehensive wedding day beauty for brides and their parties, with enough artists to handle full bridal groups in tight timeframes.

cards.title: In-Room Massage
cards.description: Spa-quality massage services delivered on-demand to your luxury hotel room — relaxation without ever leaving your suite.

cards.title: Beauty Product Discovery
cards.description: Shop and discover prestige beauty products in your hotel room or order online for home delivery through our curated retail experience.

cards.title: Corporate & Event Styling
cards.description: Professional styling for business meetings, galas, and nights out in NYC. Look your absolute best for every occasion.

steps.title: Book Your Appointment
steps.description: Choose your service, preferred time, and location. We are available daily from 6:30am to 9pm at luxury hotels and private residences.

steps.title: Your Artist Arrives
steps.description: A vetted, elite artist arrives at your door with everything needed — professional tools, premium products, and runway-level expertise.

steps.title: Look & Feel Incredible
steps.description: Sit back and be transformed. Whether it is a boardroom meeting or your wedding day, you will leave feeling confident and camera-ready.

about.label: About NOMI Beauty
about.headline: New York's Premier On-Demand Beauty Platform Since 2016
about.description: NOMI (Know-Me) Beauty was founded in New York City in 2016 to create a seamless, luxury beauty experience for travelers and locals alike. Our elite team of makeup artists and hair stylists have worked with everyone from Vanity Fair and Chanel Runways to A-list celebrities. We bring salon-quality services directly to your room at four and five star hotel partners across Manhattan and beyond.

features.title: Vogue-Featured Artists
features.description: Our team has been featured in Vogue and trained by the best educators in the beauty industry.

features.title: Luxury Hotel Partners
features.description: Available at 4 and 5 star hotels across Manhattan, Brooklyn, and greater NYC.

features.title: Scalable Teams for Events
features.description: We send enough artists to handle full bridal parties and corporate events within tight timeframes.

pricing.headline: Transparent, Luxury Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Premium beauty services with no hidden fees. Your artist, products, and travel are all included.

guarantee.headline: Our Beauty Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely thrilled with your look, we will make it right. Our artists are dedicated to giving you the exact style you envision — no compromises. Your confidence is our promise.

faqs.question: Where do you provide services?
faqs.answer: We serve guests at luxury 4 and 5 star hotel partners across Manhattan, Brooklyn, and greater New York City. We also accommodate private residences upon request.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking at least 24-48 hours in advance, though same-day appointments are often available. For weddings and large events, we suggest booking 2-4 weeks ahead.

faqs.question: What are your hours of availability?
faqs.answer: Our artists are available daily from 6:30am to 9:00pm, seven days a week — perfect for early morning meetings or evening events.

faqs.question: Can you handle my full bridal party?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in scaling our team to accommodate full bridal parties within tight timeframes. We will send enough artists to ensure everyone is ready on schedule.

faqs.question: What products do your artists use?
faqs.answer: Our artists use only prestige, professional-grade beauty products from top brands. You can also discover and purchase these products through our retail experience.

testimonials.name: Wedding Wire Bride
testimonials.text: NOMI Beauty was the best value I found for hair and makeup in NY. The whole wedding party looked amazing. They were very professional and able to send enough people to get us all done in a tight time frame.

testimonials.name: Summer Wedding Client
testimonials.text: Despite hot, humid weather and rain on my wedding day, my hair held up over 11 hours with not a single stray hair loose and my makeup remained amazing all night.

testimonials.name: Bridal Party Client
testimonials.text: The stylists were extremely friendly and talented. The makeup artists were dedicated to giving me the exact look I wanted. Our whole bridal party looked stunning.

contact.headline: Book Your Beauty Experience
contact.subtitle: Ready to look and feel incredible? Our concierge team is here to help you find the perfect service.
benefits: Personalized service matching for your occasion

footer.description: NOMI Beauty is New York City's premier on-demand beauty platform, delivering elite hair styling, makeup artistry, and massage services to luxury hotel rooms and private residences since 2016.
footer.service_area: Serving Manhattan, Brooklyn, and luxury hotel properties across New York City
